name: Easy Chocolate Dipping Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate in a double boiler until it reaches a warm, not hot, consistency.
2. Allow the melted chocolate to cool slightly until it is just tepid.
3. Gently blend in the whipping cream and hazelnut-flavored liqueur, mixing well until smooth.
4. Serve immediately over fresh or dried fruit, vanilla wafers, ladyfingers, pound cake cubes, plain cookies, pretzels, etc.
